# Test Case Design - ThermalMgmt

High-level test cases for the **ThermalMgmt** architecture model. Thermal Management: coolant loops, HVAC, pump and fan control.

---
## Test Case: TC.001 - coolant init & cyclic

**Given** the ECU has powered on
**When** `Thm_Coolant_Init` then `Thm_Coolant_Step` are called
**Then** the phase becomes RUN and `value` is a filtered, clamped sample (REQ-THM-COO7)
